Localization.Description: An attempt to disable a user account password is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} made an attempt to disable a password using the query "{object.query}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} disabled a password using the query "{object.query}" on host {event_src.host}
